limit.description: Max number of documents retrieved by the given query.

offset.description: The initial document offset; for pagination support.

quickFilterClauses.description: List of filters to be applied to the result.
quickFilterClauses.example: exclude documents that are not article: mydc_nature != 'article'

repositoryId.description: The id of the internal repository

sort.description: List of fields used to sort the result.

trackTotalCount.description: If true, the total count of documents retrieved by the query will be computed.

trackTotalCountUpTo.description: Max number of documents to count. This can be set to -1 to remove the limit but it will be expensive on large indexes.

Bulk.title: Bulk
Bulk.description: Represents a Bulk Import Job Descriptor.

BulkImportCredential.title: BulkImportCredential
BulkImportCredential.description: Represents a Bulk Import Job Credential Descriptor.

CopyCommand.title: Copy Body

name.description: Name of the document after copying.  Example: "name": "Copied file name"

targetParentId.description: Target parent id where the document will be copied.  Example: "targetParentId": "097d50d7-f839-440a-b72c-f2a51ea214b7"

CopyCommand.description: Represents Copy API's HTTP Post body.

Embedding.title: Embedding Body

sysembed_docId.description: The unique identifier for the document the embedding is associated with.

sysembed_id.description: The unique identifier for the embedding.

sysembed_score.description: A score representing the relevance of the hit

sysembed_text.description: Text label for the vector or the original chunk for text embeddings.

sysembed_type.description: A label for the embedding type (used to ensure semantic queries are against vectors of the same type).

sysembed_vector.description: The vector as a list of floating point numbers.

items.description: The vector as a list of floating point numbers.

Embedding.description: Represents the Embedding API's HTTP Post body.

ExternalUserRelationsSecurityPolicyRelat.description: Configuration for the External User Relations Security Policy relations data

ExternalUserRelationsSecurityPolicyUser.description: User for the External User Relations Security Policy data

LocationModel.description: Location the vector is derived from within the original document. For example this could be the page and paragraph number or coordinates of a bounding box.

MoveCommand.title: Move Body

targetParentId.description: Target parent id where the document will be moved.  Example: "targetParentId": "097d50d7-f839-440a-b72c-f2a51ea214b7"

MoveCommand.description: Represents the Move API's HTTP Post body.

NamedQuery.title: Named Query

limit.description: Max number of documents retrieved by the given query.

offset.description: The initial document offset; for pagination support.

repositoryId.description: The id of the internal repository.

selectedQuickFilters.description: List of filters to be applied to the result.
selectedQuickFilters.example: exclude documents that are not article: mydc_nature != 'article'

sort.description: List of fields used to sort the result.

trackTotalCount.description: If true, the total count of documents retrieved by the query will be computed.

trackTotalCountUpTo.description: Max number of documents to count. This can be set to -1 to remove the limit but it will be expensive on large indexes.

NamedQuery.description: Represents a query referencing a pre-defined named query definition by name.

Predicate.title: Query Predicate
Predicate.description: Represents an advanced query predicate definition.

PredicateParameter.title: Query Predicate Parameter
PredicateParameter.description: Represents an advanced query predicate parameter definition.

limit.description: Max number of documents retrieved by the given query.

offset.description: The initial document offset; for pagination support.

repositoryId.description: The id of the internal repository.

sort.description: List of fields used to sort the result.

trackTotalCount.description: If true, the total count of documents retrieved by the query will be computed.

trackTotalCountUpTo.description: Max number of documents to count. This can be set to -1 to remove the limit but it will be expensive on large indexes.

aggregationsBuckets.description: The list of aggregation buckets computed for the query.

documents.description: The list of retrieved documents by the given query.

limit.description: Max number of documents retrieved by the given query.

offset.description: Actual document offset; for pagination support.

repositoryId.description: The id of the internal repository.

totalCount.description: The total number of documents that match the query: is approximated if trackTotalCount is set to false.

totalCountIsTruncated.description: If true the total count of the query was truncated.

trackTotalCount.description: If true the total count of the query was computed.

QuickFilter.title: Query Quick Filter
QuickFilter.description: Represents an advanced query quick filter definition.

Rendition.title: Rendition Body

sysrendition_id.description: Name of the rendition requested.  Example: "sysrendition_id": "pdf"

Rendition.description: Represents Rendition API's HTTP Post body.

RenditionConfigOption.description: Represents an option for a rendition config.

RenditionsConfig.description: Represents a list of renditions configuration.

StringTermsBucket.description: The list of aggregation buckets computed for the query.

limit.description: Max number of aggregation buckets retrieved by the given query.

searchTerm.description: The search term to filter the terms aggregation results.

termsAggregationProperty.description: The property containing the array of keys to run the terms aggregation on.

chunkIndexes.description: The chunks that compose the Upload.

chunksCompleted.description: True if the number of loaded chunks is equals to the number of chunks size.

fileName.description: Name of the associated file of the upload.

fileSize.description: File size in bytes; -1 is returned if the size in unknown.

hasContent.description: If the upload has associated content is true

partialFileSize.description: Partial size in bytes. Amount of bytes for all uploaded chunks.

chunkFTS.description: An optional space-separated list of terms to search for in the chunk.

embeddingType.description: A wildcard query for the embedding type.

limit.description: Max number of embeddings retrieved by the given query.

offset.description: The initial embedding offset; for pagination support.

query.description: The HXQL query used to filter the embeddings by the corresponding document.

repositoryId.description: The id of the internal repository.

trackTotalCount.description: If true, the total count of embeddings retrieved by the query will be computed.

trackTotalCountUpTo.description: Max number of embeddings to count. This can be set to -1 to remove the limit but it will be expensive on large indexes.

VectorSearchResult.title: Vector Search Results

limit.description: Max number of embeddings retrieved by the given query.

offset.description: Actual embedding offset; for pagination support.

repositoryId.description: The id of the internal repository.

totalCount.description: The total number of embeddings that match the query: is approximated if trackTotalCount is set to false.

totalCountIsTruncated.description: If true the total count of the query was truncated.

trackTotalCount.description: If true the total count of the query was computed.

VectorSearchResult.description: The results of a vector search query.

VocabularyEntryRequest.description: Represents a request to create VocabularyEntry.

WhereClause.title: Query Where Clause
WhereClause.description: Represents an advanced query where clause definition.
